title: Add G and H (index reach)
description: Stretch index fingers to G (left) and H (right) - they live next to F and J
text: gg hh had gas flag glad hall half dash lash shall
finger_focus: Index fingers stretch inward to G and H

tips.text: Your hands already know the home row. Now we add two letters, G and H, and they do not ask for much: each sits right beside an anchor your index finger already owns. The job here is the inward stretch - reach, press, and come straight back.

G is one key to the right of F, so the left index reaches inward for it. H is one key to the left of J, so the right index reaches inward for that. Nothing else moves: the other seven fingers stay home on A S D F and K L while the index does the small, deliberate stretch.

tips.title: Reach, then home
tips.text: An index finger that wanders to G or H and stays there will cost you the next keystroke. Reach for the letter, press it, and let the finger fall straight back to F or J. The return matters as much as the reach.

tips.target: g g g g g g g g g g g g g g g g g g g g
tips.title: Letter G
tips.hint: Left index reaches inward to G, then back to F. One space after each.

tips.target: h h h h h h h h h h h h h h h h h h h h
tips.title: Letter H
tips.hint: Right index reaches inward to H, then back to J. One space after each.

tips.target: g h g h g h g h g h g h g h g h g h g h
tips.title: Alternate
tips.hint: Alternate the index fingers: g - h - g - h. One space after each.

tips.text: With G and H in hand you have your first proper English words. Read each one whole before you type it, then set it down letter by letter at an even pace. Do not look at your hands - trust the practice.
Accuracy is respect - for the word, for the reader, and for yourself.

tips.target: had gas flag glad hall half dash lash shall had gas flag glad
tips.title: Words
tips.hint: Words from the keys you know: had, gas, flag, glad, hall, half, dash, lash, shall.

tips.text: Every step done? Then press Open Trainer below and take one full run at the whole lesson text. That run is saved to your progress and opens the next lesson.

character_tips.anna: G and H stretch the index fingers. Always return them to F and J after each press!
character_tips.maxim: Index fingers are the strongest. G and H slot easily next to the home row.
character_tips.knopych: Stretch time! G and H - index finger super-power! ⚡
character_tips.klavochka: Great work! Index fingers reach for G and H - then straight home! ✨
